title: match — permissions
description: Two audiences per hierarchy.md §4. Tenant plane (sanctum) — coach + head_coach build squads + log events; head_coach + admin + owner publish lineups + record results + reschedule / cancel; parent role reads matches involving their child athletes only via policy narrowing. Platform plane (platform_admin) — ops + support read cross-tenant matches for support-ticket triage (never mutate). Every tenant-plane permission carries the `matches.` prefix (or `platform.matches.` on the platform audience).

permissions.name: matches.view
permissions.description: Parent role narrowed to matches whose squad contains one of their child athletes.

permissions.name: matches.create
permissions.description: Coach creates in DRAFT / SCHEDULED; head_coach approves + publishes.

permissions.name: matches.update
permissions.description: Coach can only update matches they created before publish; head_coach + admin + owner can update any match.

permissions.name: matches.reschedule
permissions.description: Change kickoff_at on a non-terminal match; re-fires notify + venue-change hook.

permissions.name: matches.abandon
permissions.description: Only from status=IN_PROGRESS. Requires reason in metadata.

permissions.name: matches.publish-lineup
permissions.description: Fires MatchLineupPublished + kicks NotifyMatchLineupPublishedJob. Requires the squad to contain >= 1 starter.

permissions.name: matches.unpublish-lineup
permissions.description: Reverses publish before kickoff. Refuses after status=IN_PROGRESS.

permissions.name: matches.record-result
permissions.description: Create + update match_results rows; scoring strategy validates the shape.

permissions.name: matches.publish-result
permissions.description: Fires MatchResultPublished + kicks the standings recompute.

permissions.name: match-events.delete
permissions.description: Corrections. Coach can delete their own inserts before publish; head_coach + admin + owner can delete any.

permissions.name: match-notes.viewAny
permissions.description: Visibility tier narrowed at policy: parents see visibility IN ('parents','public'); public/anonymous see visibility='public' only.

permissions.name: match-notes.update
permissions.description: Author edits own note; head_coach + admin + owner can edit any.

permissions.name: match-notes.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete. Author or head_coach + admin + owner.

permissions.name: match-notes.share-with-parents
permissions.description: Widen visibility to parents. Requires head_coach + admin + owner.

permissions.name: match-notes.share-with-public
permissions.description: Widen visibility to public. Requires admin + owner + tenant public-notes entitlement.

permissions.name: match-participants.create
permissions.description: Multi-team meets only — adds a participant row.

permissions.name: opponent-logos.create
permissions.description: Adds a cache row when the tenant configures a new opponent.
